title: HANDOFF.md YAML Front-Matter
description: Validates the YAML scaffolding block in support/HANDOFF.md (lines 5-31 of the template). Validates only the front-matter; prose sections (Notes, Blockers, Completed, Validation) are freeform.

instructionVersion.description: The instruction-set version this session is bound to (e.g., '2026.04').

currentPhase.description: Current scaffolding phase. Empty string permitted in fresh templates.

currentSubPhase.description: Phase 5 sub-phase. Empty for Phases 1-4 or fresh templates.

scaffoldMode.description: Scaffold breadth from resource-implementation.yaml. Default: full.

testingProfile.description: Testing profile from resource-implementation.yaml. Default: balanced.

contractsScaffolded.description: True after Phase 4 gate passes. Phase 5a/5b require this flag.

resumeCommand.description: Exact prompt to paste at the next session start. May be empty before first close.

toolingNotes.description: CLIs/MCPs discovered in Phase 3; note any missing or unavailable.

instructionGapsPath.description: Path (relative to project root) where instruction gaps are recorded. Default: INSTRUCTION-GAPS.md.

testStatusValue.description: Test phase: not-started → red (tests written, failing) → green (passing). 'skipped' for tests not in scope for the profile.

hostGateValue.description: Phase 5c per-host gate. 'scaffolded' = compiles; 'validated' = host-specific gate has passed; 'skipped' = host not enabled.
